system.flavor: You line up the perfect sequence of shots, in devotion to the sacred geometry.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6 damage
On hit different foe at exactly range 3 takes 3 damage.
Excel choose another foe at exactly range 6 to take 6 damage
Critical hit choose another foe at exactly range 9 to take 9 damage.
